# Elluminate

> Singapore's most eccentric corporate team building company. We design and deliver physical and virtual team building activities, corporate events, retreats, and training programs — 1,000+ events delivered for companies, schools, and government teams.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Elluminate's services, signature activities, and pricing.
- [About](/about): Our story, team, and approach to team building in Singapore.
- [Portfolio](/portfolio): Case studies, client logos, photos, and videos from past events.
- [Blog](/blog): Articles on team building ideas, planning, and employee engagement.

## Physical team building activities

- [Amazing Race](/services/amazing-race): Singapore's signature city-wide team race.
- [Running Man](/services/running-man): High-energy challenge based on the hit show.
- [Sotong Game](/services/sotong-game): Squid Game inspired team competition.
- [NerfWar](/services/nerfwar): Team-based foam dart battles.
- [Archery Tag](/services/archery-tag): Combat archery with foam-tipped arrows.
- [Gel Blitz](/services/gel-blitz): Tactical gel blaster team game.
- [Tag-tical Laser](/services/tag-tical-laser-teambuilding): Indoor laser tag team building.
- [CSI Bones](/services/csi-bones): Forensic-themed mystery solving.
- [Treasure Heist](/services/treasure-heist): Heist-themed escape challenge.
- [Cultural Race](/services/cultural-race): Singapore heritage discovery race.
- [Amongst Us](/services/amongst-us): Among Us inspired social deduction game.
- [Alice in Motherland](/services/alice-in-motherland): Themed adventure quest.
- [Battle of the Olympians](/services/battle-of-the-olympians): Greek-themed challenge games.
- [Builder Cross](/services/builder-cross): Hands-on construction challenge.
- [Minute to Win It](/services/minute-to-win-it): Quickfire party-style games.
- [Monopoly Dash](/services/monopoly-dash): Life-size Monopoly race around Singapore.

## Virtual team building activities

- [Amazing Race Virtual](/services/amazing-race-virtual): Online version of our flagship race.
- [The Gameshow Experience](/services/the-gameshow-experience-virtual): Live-hosted virtual gameshow.
- [Fit in Your Team](/services/fit-in-your-team-virtual): Get-to-know-you virtual icebreaker.
- [The Great Zodiac Hunt](/services/the-great-zodiac-hunt-virtual): Lunar New Year themed virtual hunt.
- [Nuclear Fallout Escape Room](/services/the-nuclear-fallout-escape-room-virtual): Virtual escape room.
- [The Patriot Act](/services/the-patriot-act-virtual): Spy-themed virtual challenge.
- [Tomb Raider King Treasure Hunt](/services/tomb-raider-king-treasure-hunt-virtual): Virtual treasure hunt.
- [Grand Christmas Delivery](/services/grand-christmas-delivery): Festive virtual team activity.

## Corporate events

- [Team Building](/services/team-building): Full team building service overview.
- [Leadership Offsites](/services/leadership-offsites): Leadership team retreats.

## Retreats and travel

- [Local Retreats](/services/local-retreats): Singapore-based corporate retreats.
- [Overseas Retreats](/services/overseas-retreats): International corporate retreats.
- [Incentive Travel](/services/incentive-travel): Reward trips for top performers.

## Training and profiling

- [MBTI](/services/mbti): MBTI personality profiling workshops.
- [DISC](/services/disc): DISC behavioral profiling workshops.
- [OCEAN](/services/ocean): Big Five personality profiling.
- [Workshops](/services/workshops): Custom corporate workshops.
- [Mass Talks](/services/mass-talks): Large-audience corporate talks.
